subject: Fixture spec for dispatcher.py integration test
body:
Per task `LANE01-W2-T2-FIXTURE-DISPATCH-V1`: Verify dispatcher.py CLI dispatches a task spec into a valid lane_message.json artifact at handoffs/inbox/Lane_01/.

Deliverables:
- handoffs/inbox/Lane_01/MSG-L01-L01-HANDOFF-<date>-<seq>.json (auto-generated by dispatcher CLI)

Evidence:
- scripts/runtime/dispatcher.py
- contracts/task_spec.schema.json

Rollback: git revert dispatcher commit; archive any messages produced from this fixture under handoffs/inbox/Lane_01/_archive/
requested_action: Lane_01 executor opens task spec `LANE01-W2-T2-FIXTURE-DISPATCH-V1`, executes per scope + deliverables, commits with [vercel skip], pushes; verification follows via aier-verify on commit_evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Both audit events satisfy LAW_N9 §L9.15 9-field shape
Idempotency proven — same input + fixed seq + fixed timestamp → identical SHA-256 hash
